name: Simone Adjei

statedReqs.notes: Starts new job downtown in five weeks. Patience is a rumor.

hiddenPrefs.desc: Company relo package will actually cover up to $510k — she's negotiating you like she negotiates everything.
Any flooding history is disqualifying — she left a flooded condo in her last city and won't repeat it.

intro: Hospital administrator relocating for a promotion. Answers emails during showings. Respects competence, notices its absence.
